inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the black body in Kelvin

inputs.label: Wavelength
inputs.businessContext: Wavelength at which spectral radiance is calculated

inputs.label: Integration Steps
inputs.businessContext: Number of steps for numerical integration

formulas.spectralRadiance: const h = 6.62607015e-34; const c = 299792458; const k = 1.380649e-23; const lambda = wavelength; const T = temperature; (2*h*c*c)/(lambda**5) * 1/(Math.exp((h*c)/(lambda*k*T)) - 1)
formulas.totalRadiance: const h = 6.62607015e-34; const c = 299792458; const k = 1.380649e-23; const T = temperature; const lamMin = wavelengthMin; const lamMax = wavelengthMax; const N = numSteps; const dlam = (lamMax - lamMin)/N; let sum = 0; for(let i=0; i<N; i++){ const lam = lamMin + (i+0.5)*dlam; sum += (2*h*c*c)/(lam**5) * 1/(Math.exp((h*c)/(lam*k*T)) - 1) * dlam; } sum
